title: Hummus on the Moon? Scientists have successfully grown chickpeas using lunar dirt - BBC Sky at Night Magazine
summary_full: Hummus on the Moon? Scientists have successfully grown chickpeas using lunar dirt  BBC Sky at Night MagazineBioremediation of lunar regolith simulant through mycorrhizal fungi and plant symbioses enables chickpea to seed  NatureWith lunar missions looming, scientists grow chickpeas in 'moon dirt'  ReutersCan we grow life on Mars?
